listings.title: Mapex T750A Drum Throne
listings.body: In good shape. Features: * The larger size and added cushioning of the 14” wide x 4” round seat provides a dramatic increase in comfort as young players grow and spend more time sitting behind their drums. * The 18” to 26” height range with steel spindle adjustment and memory lock is ideal for advanced players that will often make frequent minor adjustments to their throne height. * The double-brace legs with slip-proof rubber feet provide durability and stability. * 14 x 4” Thick Round Top Cushioned Seat * Soft Vinyl Covering * 18" to 25" Threaded Steel Spindle Height Adjustment with Memory Lock * Double-Braced Quad Legs * Slip-Proof Rubber Feet Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff 🥁

listings.title: Randall RG13 Guitar Pedal and/or Amplifier with power cord
listings.body: The Randall RG13 may very well be the most ambitious amp-in-a-stomp box product ever conceived. This sort of thing is usually just a preamp or distortion box marketed with claims that it can perform like a real amp. The RG13, however, truly is a standalone solid-state guitar amp that can be connected straight to a speaker cabinet or placed in front of a guitar or power amp like a stomp box or preamp. Features: The RG13 pedal amp provides three independent, separately voiced channels, each with its own set of gain and volume controls. Channel 1—the clean channel—also provides a bright switch. All three channels share the same set of bass, middle, treble and presence boost/cut EQ controls, a bass boost switch, and a mid scoop switch. Other front-panel features include three separate footswitches for selecting channels, a Loop-Boost mode with level boost/cut control and footswitch (more on this below), and a master volume. The RG13’s side panels contain a 1/4-inch guitar input, a 1/8-inch stereo media input, a 1/4-inch unbalanced line output without speaker emulation, an XLR balanced output with speaker emulation, and a ground/lift switch. The rear panel features 1/4-inch mono send and return jacks, a switch for selecting effect loop or boost functions, a 1/4-inch speaker output for connection to an eight-ohm (minimum) speaker cabinet, and a nine-volt DC/500mA center-negative power output that can be used to supply power to other stomp boxes. The Loop-Boost section can be configured for several different functions. With Loop mode selected via the push switch, it functions like a standard effect loop. With Boost mode selected, it bypasses the effect loop and allows users to adjust boost or cut level with the front panel Loop-Boost control and engage that setting with the Loop-Boost footswitch. With the Loop setting selected and nothing plugged into the send and return jacks, the Loop-Boost footswitch performs a mute function. If you plug a tuner into the send jack only and engage the Loop setting, the Loop-Boost footswitch will mute the signal and allow you to tune up in silence.

listings.title: Pearl Single Braced Snare Drum Stand
listings.body: The Pearl Single Braced Snare Drum Stand is a high-quality and durable stand specifically designed for holding a single braced snare drum in place during performances or practice sessions. Made by the reputable brand Pearl, this stand provides stability and support for the snare drum, allowing musicians to focus on their playing without worrying about the drum slipping or falling over. Ideal for drummers looking for a reliable and sleek accessory to enhance their setup, the Pearl Single Braced Snare Drum Stand is a must-have for any percussionist.

listings.body: The Mapex MPX Steel Shell Piccolo Snare Drum is a high-quality musical instrument designed for percussionists. With a 14-inch steel shell and a compact size of 14x3.5 inches, this piccolo snare drum offers a bright and cutting sound that is perfect for various musical genres. Made by the reputable brand Mapex, this snare drum is a reliable choice for drummers looking to add a unique and dynamic element to their playing.

With its compact size and sturdy construction, this snare drum is perfect for musicians who want a versatile and expressive sound in their drum set.

listings.title: BIAMP Audia Flex TI-2 Digital Audio Processor #2
listings.body: The BIAMP Audia Flex TI-2 Digital Audio Processor is a top-of-the-line device designed for professional audio equipment. With its 2 channels and rack mountable form factor, it is perfect for any pro audio setup. The processor is digital and boasts a sleek design, making it a great addition to any music instrument or gear collection. The model is BIAMP Audia Flex TI-2, which is known for its exceptional sound quality and advanced features. Whether you're a musician or a sound engineer, this device is a must-have for anyone looking to take their audio to the next level.

listings.body: The Boom Cymbal Arm Post Mount Holder Stand Rack is designed to hold a 24-inch cymbal securely in place. This accessory is essential for percussionists and drummers looking to have easy access to their cymbals while playing. Its long length allows for convenient positioning and easy operation, making it a reliable choice for musicians looking to enhance their drumming experience.
